evidence: Phase 2 (FGAP-026 closure phase 2: High-impact query tools) complete at HEAD 680cb1c via 4 atomic sub-phases. Original 5-tool scope reduced to 4 after Explore agent enumeration surfaced walk-by-relation as pre-existing at HEAD bcf2e60 (walkDescendants project-context.ts:325 + walkLensDescendants lens-view.ts:255 + project-walk-descendants pi tool index.ts:1073). Sub-phase chain: 2.1 filter-block-items (TASK-034 / VER-005 / commit 15cd881) → 2.2 resolve-items-by-id bulk (TASK-035 / VER-006 / commit 2ddf85f) → 2.3 walk-ancestors FGAP-029 partial (TASK-036 / VER-007 / commit 7cb17f0) → 2.4 find-references (TASK-037 / VER-008 / commit 680cb1c). Test counts: pi-context 401 → 428 (+27 cumulative); pi-jit-agents 150/0/1 unchanged; pi-workflows 824/0/2 unchanged; pi-behavior-monitors 157/157 unchanged. Every sub-phase commit landed via husky pre-commit gate (npm run check && npm test) without --no-verify.
